//: EXAMPLE hook config for mobile-ssh — NOT a live settings file. Do NOT put this in this repo's .claude/settings.json (that holds the Trellis workflow hooks, and the cc you remote-control runs under a DIFFERENT project at BRIDGE_CWD). Copy the `hooks` block below into the .claude/settings.json of the TARGET project you let Claude work in (the one you pass as BRIDGE_CWD), or into your machine-wide ~/.claude/settings.json. See README §PR4. The cc you remote-control and the bridge run on the SAME machine, so the URLs are loopback (http://127.0.0.1:<BRIDGE_PORT>) — loopback is correct here and opens no public port.
//timeout: The 300s hook timeout is the cap on how long cc waits; the bridge answers first via APPROVAL_TIMEOUT_MS (default 280s) with the fail-closed default (deny). Keep 300 > APPROVAL_TIMEOUT_MS.
//auth: Authorization: Bearer $BRIDGE_TOKEN must match the bridge's BRIDGE_TOKEN env. allowedEnvVars lets cc interpolate $BRIDGE_TOKEN from the environment (it must be set in the shell that launches cc).
//schema: PreToolUse http-hook input/response schema is per the cc docs but evolves; confirm with `claude --debug` for your installed cc version (research/claude-code-hooks-approval.md Caveats). The bridge parses input defensively and replies with hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision.

Notification.//: OPTIONAL: notify-only pushes for idle/permission prompts. Safe to omit — PreToolUse already pushes for approvals.
